description: Dataset-backed triage with mostly accurate hints, no arrivals, and enough clarity to test basic routing.

initial_tickets.description: My enterprise subscription for Payment Gateway was cancelled unexpectedly and I need clarification.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Generated from CSV ticket 4 (Subscription Cancellation on Payment Gateway). Route to billing; priority is medium from the source severity and action is resolve from the source status and escalation signals.

initial_tickets.description: Users can no longer access Web Portal; the account appears suspended after sign-in on Edge for MacOS.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Generated from CSV ticket 1 (Account Suspension on Web Portal). Route to technical; priority is high from the source severity and action is escalate from the source status and escalation signals.

initial_tickets.description: Does Web Portal support scheduled summary exports for individual teams, or is that only available on another plan?
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Generated from CSV ticket 27 (Feature Request on Web Portal). Route to general; priority is low from the source severity and action is resolve from the source status and escalation signals.

initial_tickets.description: I need a refund for the recent Mobile App charge on my Crypto statement.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Generated from CSV ticket 18 (Refund Request on Mobile App). Route to billing; priority is low from the source severity and action is resolve from the source status and escalation signals.

initial_tickets.description: My payment for E-commerce Store looks wrong, but I am not sure which invoice or workspace is affected yet. It was billed through Crypto.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Generated from CSV ticket 318 (Payment Problem on E-commerce Store). Route to billing; priority is medium from the source severity and action is request_info from the source status and escalation signals.

initial_tickets.description: Users can no longer access Cloud Storage; the account appears suspended after sign-in on Safari for Android.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Generated from CSV ticket 13 (Account Suspension on Cloud Storage). Route to technical; priority is high from the source severity and action is escalate from the source status and escalation signals.
